models.name: Llama 3.2 1B
models.description: Tiny + fast. Great default for the in-app assistant on modest hardware.

models.name: Llama 3.2 3B
models.description: Noticeably smarter than 1B while still light. A good all-rounder.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 1.5B
models.description: Compact and strong at reasoning + code for its size.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 7B
models.description: Capable mid-size model. Best when you have the RAM/VRAM for it.

models.name: Phi 3.5 Mini
models.description: 3.8B that punches above its weight on reasoning tasks.

models.name: Gemma 2 2B
models.description: Small, polished, and quick. A nice lightweight alternative to Llama.

models.name: Mistral 7B
models.description: The classic fast, high-quality 7B. Solid general chat + instructions.

models.name: Nomic Embed Text
models.description: Embedding model (not chat) for semantic search / RAG features.
